options.name: progression_balancing
options.description:
A system that can move progression earlier, to try and prevent the player from getting stuck and bored early.

A lower setting means more getting stuck. A higher setting means less getting stuck.

options.name: accessibility
options.description:
Set rules for reachability of your items/locations.

**Full:** ensure everything can be reached and acquired.

**Minimal:** ensure what is needed to reach your goal can be acquired.

options.name: player_gender
options.description: sets the players gender in game

options.name: polly_gender
options.description: sets pollys gender in game

options.name: game_difficulty
options.description: sets the client game difficulty

options.name: lovers_instead_wings
options.description: require player to get all available pairs to lovers instead of collecting wings

options.name: boss_wings_requirement
options.description:
number of wings required to access the boss
NOTE: Asking Kyu about the wings will show you the amount of wings needed

options.name: number_of_starting_girls
options.description: number of girls you start unlocked Note will prioritise fulfilling the amount of starting pairs so may be higher then set

options.name: number_of_starting_pairs
options.description: number of pairs you start unlocked

options.name: enabled_girls
options.description: girls enabled to be accessed

options.name: enable_questions
options.description: enable having items locked behind asking girls their favourite stuff Note if there is not enough locations for items it will add shop locations to satisfy the locations needed

options.name: randomise_girl_token
options.description: randomise tokens girls like/dislike

options.name: randomise_girl_baggage
options.description: randomise girls baggage

options.name: disable_baggage
options.description: disable baggage completely

options.name: randomise_girl_gifts
options.description: randomise unique/shoe gifts for each girl

options.name: disable_outfits
options.description: disable having outfits as locations/items

options.name: outfits_require_date_completion
options.description: require date to be successfully completed before outfit can be unlocked

options.name: number_blue_seed
options.description: number of blue note seeds given at start

options.name: number_green_seed
options.description: number of green star seeds given at start

options.name: number_orange_seed
options.description: number of orange moon seeds given at start

options.name: number_red_seed
options.description: number of red flame seeds given at start

options.name: number_shop_items
options.description: number of archipelago items in the shop Note if there is not enough locations for items it will add shop locations to satisfy the locations needed, MAX is 494 so total locations isn't over 1000

options.name: exclude_shop_items
options.description:
shop items after the number set will be excluded from having progression items in them. will do nothing if set higher than the number of shop items, 
NOTE will cause world generation to fail if number is set too low as there will be not enough location slots for progression items

options.name: hide_shop_item_details
options.description: hide shop item id and item progression category

options.name: shop_food_min
options.description: set min value for food shop items. MUST BE LOWER OR EQUAL TO shop_food_max

options.name: shop_food_max
options.description: set max value for food shop items. MUST BE HIGHER OR EQUAL TO shop_food_min

options.name: shop_date_gift_min
options.description: set min value for date gift shop items. MUST BE LOWER OR EQUAL TO shop_date_gift_max

options.name: shop_date_gift_max
options.description: set max value for date gift shop items. MUST BE HIGHER OR EQUAL TO shop_date_gift_min

options.name: shop_girl_gift_min
options.description: set min value for Unique/Shoe gift shop items. MUST BE LOWER OR EQUAL TO shop_girl_gift_max

options.name: shop_girl_gift_max
options.description: set max value for Unique/Shoe gift shop items. MUST BE HIGHER OR EQUAL TO shop_girl_gift_min

options.name: shop_arch_min
options.description: set min value for Arch shop items. MUST BE LOWER OR EQUAL TO shop_arch_max

options.name: shop_arch_max
options.description: set max value for Arch shop items. MUST BE HIGHER OR EQUAL TO shop_arch_min

options.name: puzzle_goal_start
options.description: Starting affection goal for date puzzles

options.name: puzzle_goal_add
options.description: affection added to the starting goal based on how many pairs you have taken on dates

options.name: puzzle_goal_boss
options.description: affection goal for boss puzzles

options.name: puzzle_moves
options.description: moves you start a puzzle with (EASY MODE=30, NORMAL MODE=25, HARD MODE=20) NOTE: boss fight will start with 4x this number caped at 999

options.name: filler_item
options.description:
how the filler item is handled by making them all either:
nothing: nothing items,
seed: random seed items,
date: random date gifts
mixed: all of above
